parameters.query: SELECT tablename, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('n8n_data."' || tablename || '"')) AS size, (now() - (SELECT reltuples::bigint FROM pg_class WHERE relname = tablename LIMIT 1)::text::interval) IS NULL AS unknown_age FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'n8n_data' AND tablename LIKE 'tmp_%_step_%' ORDER BY tablename

DO $$ DECLARE r RECORD; dropped INT := 0; BEGIN FOR r IN SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'n8n_data' AND tablename LIKE 'tmp_%_step_%' LOOP EXECUTE 'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS n8n_data."' || r.tablename || '"'; dropped := dropped + 1; END LOOP; RAISE NOTICE 'Dropped % temp table(s)', dropped; END $$;

SELECT tablename, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('n8n_data."' || tablename || '"')) AS size, (now() - (SELECT reltuples::bigint FROM pg_class WHERE relname = tablename LIMIT 1)::text::interval) IS NULL AS unknown_age FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'n8n_data' AND tablename LIKE 'tmp_%_step_%' ORDER BY tablename

DO $$ DECLARE r RECORD; dropped INT := 0; BEGIN FOR r IN SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'n8n_data' AND tablename LIKE 'tmp_%_step_%' LOOP EXECUTE 'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS n8n_data."' || r.tablename || '"'; dropped := dropped + 1; END LOOP; RAISE NOTICE 'Dropped % temp table(s)', dropped; END $$;
